'''Alba-16''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Belsmuth sector/Legends|Belsmuth sector]].

==History==
Discovered by [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] scouts sometime between the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]] and the [[Kanz Disorders/Legends|Kanz Disorders]], Alba-16 joined the Republic as early as the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. Following the lead of nearby worlds after suffering the [[Mandalorian Wars]], Alba-16 joined [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan's]] [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Remaining in [[Sith Worlds/Legends|Sith Space]] until the Republic retook the sector when the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] vanquished the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]], the planet would remain loyal to the Republic for the next several millennia.<ref name="TEA" />

In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], the planet was in the midst of a violent civil war. [[Nuuta]], one of the [[Memory wipe/Legends|renewed]] [[Phindian/Legends|Phindians]], was sent to Alba as punishment for fighting against the [[Syndicat]] on [[Phindar/Legends|Phindar]]. The use of the world as a penal camp was ended by the efforts of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. Seceding from the Republic during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the planet joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], only to return to the Republic, now the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], as the CIS was defeated.<ref name="TEA" />

After the rise of the Empire, the planet had little real Imperial presence, lacking a garrison. Ex-Jedi and fugitive [[Ferus Olin]] went to a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on Alba-16 following his escape from [[Dontamo]]'s prison facility. Surviving the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the planet was located in the area controlled by Warlord [[Zsinj]]'s empire during the years following [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] demise. While Zsinj was ultimately killed, the planet would remain loyal to the infamous [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] until he was assassinated. Remaining distant from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the world would be cut off from the galaxy by the horrors of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. As of [[137 ABY]] the Belsmuth sector was located in space controlled by [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Originally mentioned in [[Jude Watson]]'s ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Hidden Past]]'', Alba was noted as having been engaged in a civil war. While the next mention of the world denotes it as Alba-16, the planet is placed in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], near the world [[Dontamo]]. With the release of ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', the world is [[Retroactive continuity|retconned]] to be located in the [[Belsmuth sector/Legends|Belsmuth sector]] of the Outer Rim Territories.
